tasks.title: Remove dead Make.com inbound callback routes and their mounting
tasks.description: Delete apps/api/src/routes/integrations/make/social/jobs/{claim,result,index}.ts and remove their wiring in apps/api/src/routes/index.ts (import L110, the socialFeatureTagMiddleware mount at L585 for '/api/v1/integrations/make/social/*', and the two app.route calls L603-604). Before deleting the L585 middleware line, confirm nothing else mounts under '/api/v1/integrations/make/social/*' (grep the routes dir). Update or delete apps/api/test/routes/integrations/make/social/jobs/make-callbacks.test.ts accordingly. Verify apps/api typechecks after removal.

subtasks.title: Remove import + middleware + 2 route mounts in routes/index.ts
Confirm no other route under the same integrations/make/social path

tasks.title: Remove handleMakeCallbackClaim/Result handlers and their types from dispatch service
tasks.description: Delete SocialPublishDispatchService.handleMakeCallbackClaim (~L1527) and handleMakeCallbackResult (~L1628) plus their input/result type blocks (L270-325) and related JSDoc references (L29-32) in packages/service-core/src/services/social/social-publish-dispatch.service.ts. Confirm dispatchTarget keeps its OWN retry/exhaust logic intact (L1197/1246/1277) — these paths are parallel, dispatchTarget is the live one. Remove the now-dead unit test blocks (SPEC-254 T-047, ~L3165-3760) in social-publish-dispatch.service.test.ts, the '(legacy)' scenarios in test/integration/services/social/full-pipeline.integration.test.ts, and check dispatch-edge-cases.test.ts:29 (comment-only vs real usage). Ensure @repo/service-core typechecks and its social suite passes.

subtasks.title: Delete both handler methods + their type blocks + JSDoc
Remove T-047 unit test blocks in service.test.ts

tasks.title: Remove HOSPEDA_MAKE_INBOUND_KEY from env registry, env schema and .env.example
tasks.description: Delete the HOSPEDA_MAKE_INBOUND_KEY entry from packages/config/src/env-registry.hospeda.ts (~L1968) AND apps/api/src/utils/env-schema.ts (the spec only names the registry but it lives in both) AND any apps/api/.env.example placeholder. Run pnpm env:check:registry to confirm the app schema still matches the registry after removal. Note in the PR/closeout that the value must be unset/deprecated in Coolify (AC-4) — operator action, not code.

tasks.title: Remove social-make-callback.schema.ts if orphaned after handler deletion
tasks.description: After T-002, check whether packages/schemas/src/entities/social/social-make-callback.schema.ts is referenced anywhere outside the now-deleted callback path (grep for its exported symbols across apps + packages). If it is only used by the dead callback routes/handlers/tests, delete it and its barrel export. If it is still referenced by the live synchronous path (e.g. MakeWebhookResponseSchema lives in social-make-payload.schema.ts, not here — confirm), leave it. Document the decision in the PR.

subtasks.title: Grep all references to the callback schema's exports
Delete + de-barrel if orphaned, else leave with a note

tasks.title: Add GET /api/v1/admin/social/make-webhook-schema endpoint
tasks.description: New admin route mirroring apps/api/src/routes/social/admin/gpt-action-schema.ts (~291 LOC pattern, uses @hono/zod-openapi getOpenAPI31Document — prefer the same generator over adding zod-to-json-schema, for consistency). Programmatically emit JSON Schema of SocialMakePayloadSchema + MakeWebhookResponseSchema from packages/schemas/src/entities/social/social-make-payload.schema.ts. Response: { payloadSchema, responseSchema, webhookUrl, makeApiKeyConfigured }. webhookUrl comes from SocialSettingService (make_webhook_url), makeApiKeyConfigured is a boolean derived from HOSPEDA_MAKE_API_KEY presence — NEVER return the raw secret. Gate with SOCIAL_SETTINGS_MANAGE permission, same as the GPT endpoint. Mount it next to gpt-action-schema in the admin social router.

subtasks.title: Generate JSON Schema from the two Zod schemas programmatically
Wire webhookUrl via SocialSettingService + makeApiKeyConfigured boolean
Gate SOCIAL_SETTINGS_MANAGE and mount the route

tasks.title: Test make-webhook-schema is generated, not hand-written (AC-1)
tasks.description: Route test in apps/api/test/... asserting the endpoint returns a valid JSON Schema matching SocialMakePayloadSchema's current shape, gated by SOCIAL_SETTINGS_MANAGE (401/403 without it), and that webhookUrl/makeApiKeyConfigured are surfaced correctly (secret never leaked). AC-1 proof: a test that mutates/adds a field on the Zod schema (or asserts a known field is present because it exists in the Zod schema) and confirms the endpoint output reflects it — proving programmatic generation. Follow the existing gpt-action-schema route test as a template if one exists.

subtasks.title: Schema-shape assertion tied to the Zod source
Assert makeApiKeyConfigured boolean + no raw secret in body

tasks.title: Add admin hook + types to consume make-webhook-schema (and reuse GPT schema fetch)
tasks.description: TanStack Query hook in apps/admin (e.g. use-social-integration-config.ts) fetching /api/v1/admin/social/make-webhook-schema, plus whatever is needed to fetch/expose the existing gpt-action-schema for Panel 1. Types sourced from @repo/schemas where possible. Follow existing admin social hooks (use-social-platform-settings.ts) for the fetch/error pattern.

subtasks.title: Fetch path for the GPT action schema (Panel 1)
Typed responses, error handling per existing pattern

tasks.title: Build Integration Config Export admin page with GPT + Make panels
tasks.description: New route apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/social/integration-config/index.tsx rendering two components: GptActionExportPanel (copy-to-clipboard/download of the GPT OpenAPI schema, Panel 1) and MakeWebhookExportPanel (webhook URL, outbound headers with x-make-apikey masked + reveal-on-click, and the live JSON Schema block, Panel 2). Reuse the existing admin copy-to-clipboard pattern and the secret-masking pattern from SettingsTable. Tailwind utilities (admin styling), Shadcn UI, @repo/icons only (no inline SVG). Uses the T-007 hook.

subtasks.title: MakeWebhookExportPanel (URL, masked header reveal, JSON Schema block)

tasks.title: Add i18n keys for the Integration Config Export page (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Add all user-facing strings (page title, panel titles, copy/download/reveal button labels, helper text) to @repo/i18n locale files for es, en and pt. Run the i18n generate-types step. No hard-coded strings in the components.

tasks.title: Register the Integration Config Export route in admin nav
tasks.description: Add the new page to the admin Marketing/social sidebar config (apps/admin/src/config/ia/sidebars.ts or equivalent) so operators can reach it. Use @repo/icons for the nav icon. Confirm the route is guarded like other _authed/social routes.

tasks.title: Component tests for the export panels (AC-2)
tasks.description: testing-library tests for GptActionExportPanel + MakeWebhookExportPanel: both panels render given mocked hook data, and each copy-to-clipboard button copies the expected content (mock clipboard), and the masked API-key indicator reveals on click without exposing a real secret. AC-2 coverage.

subtasks.title: Render tests for both panels with mocked data
